page: Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Famsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture is supported by 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, though it is premium storage capable.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top 10% and Geekbench single-core scores in the top 25%. Single-threaded bzip3 decompression and text processing also demonstrate strong performance. However, multi-core operations and memory bandwidth write speeds fall into the average tier, while uncached large-block read-only memory bandwidth is weak, landing in the bottom 25%. Small model LLM text generation is strong, but prompt processing for medium models is relatively weak.

Given its high memory density of 8.0 GB per core and dedicated CPU allocation, the F4ams_v6 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive multi-core scaling or local NVMe storage. It is well-suited for database operations, caching layers, text processing, and lightweight single-threaded applications where memory capacity and single-core performance are prioritized over parallelized compute density.
description: The Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Famsv6 family, powered by a dedicated 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 4 vCPUs and 4 physical cores. It features 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, and operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it supports premium storage. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong single-threaded text processing and decompression capabilities, though uncached large-block memory read bandwidth is weak. This configuration is highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, caching layers, and single-threaded applications requiring substantial memory capacity without the need for local NVMe storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a 4-core AMD EPYC 9V74 processor, 32.0 GB of RAM, and top-tier single-core CPU performance for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F4ams_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 4 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and strong single-core performance.
tagline: A memory-intensive virtual server delivering strong single-core performance and high memory-to-core density for database and caching workloads.

32.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong single-threaded decompression
No local storage included, but supports premium external storage
Best suited for memory-intensive databases, caching, and text processing
